headline: This Underrated Artificial Intelligence (AI) Infrastructure Stock Has Surged 80% in a Year. It Can Still Surge 53%.
summary: This company's AI data center solutions are driving stronger revenue and earnings growth, a trend that seems sustainable in the long run.
